touristSupportNumbers.label: Ho Chi Minh City Visitor Support

hospitalGuidance: Search "bệnh viện gần đây" (nearest hospital) in Google Maps or ask hotel or hostel staff - this works even with basic Vietnamese.
embassyGuidance: Numbers below are a starting point - confirm on your embassy's official site before relying on them. If your country is not listed, search "[your country] embassy Vietnam emergency contact".

helpPhrase.vietnamese: Xin lỗi, tôi đang gặp nguy hiểm và cần giúp đỡ. Xin hãy gọi số 113 (công an) hoặc 115 (cấp cứu) giúp tôi. Cảm ơn bạn.
helpPhrase.english: Sorry, I am in danger and need help. Please call 113 (police) or 115 (ambulance) for me. Thank you.
